privileged_info_summary: This is a real historical article by Adam Liptak from The New York Times published on June 26-27, 2015, covering the landmark Obergefell v. Hodges Supreme Court decision. The article title, author, publication, and core subject matter (same-sex marriage) are all verified. The article discusses the Supreme Court's ruling that the Constitution guarantees a right to same-sex marriage. The publication place (New York) and URL domain (nytimes.com) are verified. While section A and page A1 placement could not be explicitly confirmed, these are consistent with the article's importance and the URL structure (u.s. news section).
